title: O Bless the Lord with All My Soul

verses.text: Your deepest longings he fulfills From his unending stores of good, So, like the eagle’s strength in flight, Your youthful vigor is renewed. The Lord performs his righteousness, And justice gives to suff’ring ones. To Moses he made known his ways, His mighty deeds to Isr’els sons.

The Lord is merciful and kind, To anger slow, and full of grace. He will not constantly reprove, Or in his anger hid his face. He does not punish our misdeeds, or give our sins their just reward. How great his love –as high as heav’n To all of those who fear the Lord!
